biological_replicate: data from seven pediatric samples identified USP20 as an SE-regulated driver gene.
experimental_design: In vivo studies showed that USP20 knockdown reduced tumor growth.
factor_value: Knocking down USP20 with short hairpin RNA (shRNA) increased apoptosis.
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: 6 cell lines + 7 patients = 13 total biological replicates.
